# devzero_get_cluster_id_by_name (Data Source)

Looks up an existing cluster by team ID and name, returning its ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a cluster ID by name using the provider's default team ID
data "devzero_get_cluster_id_by_name" "example" {
  name = "my-cluster"
}

output "cluster_id" {
  value = data.devzero_get_cluster_id_by_name.example.cluster_id
}

# Look up a cluster ID with optional filters
data "devzero_get_cluster_id_by_name" "filtered" {
  name           = "my-cluster"
  region         = "us-east-1"   # optional: filter by region
  cloud_provider = "AWS"         # optional: filter by cloud provider (AWS | GCP | AKS | OCI)
  liveness       = "PREFER_LIVE" # optional: IGNORE | PREFER_LIVE | REQUIRE_LIVE
}

output "filtered_cluster_id" {
  value = data.devzero_get_cluster_id_by_name.filtered.cluster_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The cluster name to look up.

### Optional

- `cloud_provider` (String) Optional cloud provider filter. One of: 'AWS', 'GCP', 'AKS', 'OCI'.
- `liveness` (String) Controls liveness filtering: IGNORE, PREFER_LIVE, or REQUIRE_LIVE.
- `region` (String) Optional region filter, e.g. "us-east-1".
- `team_id` (String) The team ID to search within. Defaults to the provider team_id if not set.

### Read-Only

- `cluster_id` (String) The ID of the cluster matching the given team and name.
